# itsparam.dev - Full LLM Context

This file provides machine-readable context for AI systems.

## Identity
Parampreet Singh is an AI engineer and educator focused on practical machine learning, GenAI workflows, and full-stack product execution.

## Expertise
- Machine Learning
- Artificial Intelligence
- GenAI applications
- LLM/SLM adaptation workflows (SFT, PEFT, LoRA)
- LangGraph agent systems
- FastAPI backend engineering
- Next.js frontend engineering
- PyTorch experimentation

## Education
- IIT Madras, BS in Data Science and Applications

## Work and Projects
1. Pocket-Coder: Local AI coding assistant with model adaptation workflows.
2. GRWM: Multi-agent README generation system.
3. Hand Gesture LNN: Gesture modeling and architecture comparison work.
4. Quizzo V2: Full-stack quiz platform with queueing and analytics capabilities.
5. Gurmat Darbar: Community-driven product platform with practical deployment impact.

## Teaching Impact
- 175K+ learners reached
- 70+ live sessions delivered
- 500+ learner feedback entries
- Python and machine learning guidance with practical orientation
